fields.label: Submittable?
fields.rationale: Most DocTypes are not submittable. Submittable documents have a draft/submitted/cancelled lifecycle and gate submit/cancel/amend perms. Incompatible with istable=1.

fields.label: Child table?
fields.rationale: Child tables only exist inside a parent DocType. Incompatible with is_submittable, is_tree, quick_entry, track_changes. Cannot be standalone.

fields.label: Singleton?
fields.rationale: Single DocTypes store exactly one record (settings-style). set_only_once on creation - cannot be toggled after save.

fields.label: Tree structure?
fields.rationale: Tree DocTypes use the Nested Set Model. Incompatible with istable=1. Requires a nsm_parent_field.

fields.label: Naming rule
fields.rationale: Autoincrement is safe when naming intent is unclear. Changing naming_rule to Autoincrement AFTER records exist fails - the name column type changes from VARCHAR to INT. Pick carefully up front.

fields.label: Autoname expression
fields.rationale: Concrete autoname: 'autoincrement' for Autoincrement rule; 'field:<fieldname>' for By fieldname (the field becomes unique=1); 'naming_series:<fieldname>' for By Naming Series (the field must exist AND carry options='Naming Series'); 'format:<pattern>' for Expression (pattern like 'INV-.####'); 'hash' for Random; 'prompt' for Set by user.

fields.label: Track changes
fields.rationale: Records per-field diffs in Version DocType on every save. Enable for audit-sensitive data. Incompatible with istable=1.

fields.label: Title field (fieldname)
fields.rationale: Field displayed in link suggestions and list views. Must name a real Data / Link / Small Text field on this DocType - Frappe does NOT validate the fieldtype, so pointing at a Table field fails silently at render time. Empty defaults to the document name.

fields.label: Search fields (comma-separated)
fields.rationale: Fields included in global search. Each must be a real fieldname on this DocType. Empty means only the name is searchable.

fields.label: Default sort field
fields.rationale: Default order_by for list views. 'creation' is the Frappe standard and works for every DocType without a custom sort field.

fields.label: Default sort order
fields.rationale: DESC (newest first) matches Desk UX for most transactional DocTypes. ASC for reference masters (Account, Cost Center).

fields.label: Allow rename
fields.rationale: Users with write access can rename records. Default 1 is the Frappe standard; set 0 for DocTypes where the name is an immutable identifier referenced by other records.

fields.label: Allow bulk import
fields.rationale: Required 1 if any DocPerm row on the DocType sets `import=1`. Default 0; enable only for DocTypes that should accept CSV / XLSX imports via the Desk Import tool.

fields.label: Image field (fieldname)
fields.rationale: Names an Attach Image field on this DocType; when set, that image renders as the document thumbnail in list and link-preview contexts. Must name a real Attach Image field - Frappe does NOT validate the fieldtype, so pointing at a Data field renders broken thumbnails.

fields.label: Timeline field (fieldname)
fields.rationale: Names a Link field on this DocType whose target's timeline (comments + communications) should be merged into this DocType's timeline. Common for transactional docs that reference a master (Sales Invoice -> Customer).

fields.label: Default print format
fields.rationale: Names an existing Print Format for this DocType that should be the default in the Print dialog. Empty means Frappe's built-in standard print format. Validated at render time, not save.

fields.label: Permissions
fields.rationale: At least one permission row at permlevel=0 is required - the controller rejects DocTypes without a level-0 perm. System Manager full access is the minimum usable default. Add role rows for end users.
